texto: You are consciousness itself -- not the objects of consciousness. They used clear-color prisms and waterdrums to help him relax. You have a body, but you are not your body. You are the awareness of your body. You have thoughts, but you are not your thoughts. You have feelings, but you are not they. Who are you?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de A.A. Attanasio que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “You are consciousness itself -- not the objects of consciousness. They used clear-color prisms an…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, life-philosophy, consciousness, com foco em reflexao.
